title: calophyllum wightianum
intro: Calophyllum wightianum, also known as the Wight's mahogany or Calophyllum tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Western Ghats of India. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calophyllum wightianum include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Calophyllum wightianum include oil extractions, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
